headline: Mesopotamia
description: Mesopotamia ('land between rivers' — Tigris & Euphrates, modern Iraq) was the 'cradle of civilization.' First cities (~4000 BCE, Uruk), writing (cuneiform, ~3400 BCE), wheel, plow, irrigation, legal codes (Hammurabi's Code, ~1750 BCE), mathematics (base-60). Sumerians → Akkadians → Babylonians → Assyrians.
